title: fimbristylis chinensis
intro: Fimbristylis chinensis, also known as the Chinese hairgrass, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects, which are often used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Fimbristylis chinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are prepared by boiling the plant's roots or rhizomes in water to release its active compounds.
